name: Eggnog Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a stainless-steel bowl, beat egg yolks and 1/2 cup sugar over hot water until the mixture lightens in color and becomes fluffy.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Add softened gelatin to the yolk mixture and stir until combined.
5. Chill for 10 minutes.
6. In a separate bowl, whip cream, remaining 1/2 cup sugar, nutmeg, and vanilla until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chilled egg yolk mixture.
8. Carefully incorporate the beaten egg whites until just combined.
9. Chill for 4-6 hours before serving.
10. Garnish with crushed peppermint candies.
Serves 4 to 6
